evals.prompt: Map the term 'space group' to the CMSO ontology. I want to know which class and properties correspond to this concept.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs concept_mapper.py to find CMSO classes and properties matching 'space group', returning matches with confidence scores.
assertions: Invokes scripts/concept_mapper.py with --ontology cmso --term 'space group' --json
Output includes results.matches with confidence scores (1.0 for exact, 0.9 for synonym)
Returns the matching CMSO class (Space Group) and related properties
Reports any unmatched terms or alternative suggestions

evals.prompt: I have an FCC copper crystal with lattice parameter a=3.615 angstroms and space group 225. Map these crystallographic parameters to CMSO ontology terms.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs crystal_mapper.py to translate FCC, space group 225, and lattice constant into CMSO-compliant annotations with Bravais lattice symbol.
assertions: Invokes scripts/crystal_mapper.py with --ontology cmso --bravais FCC --space-group 225 --a 3.615 --json
Output includes results.ontology_classes and results.ontology_properties
Maps FCC to the correct Bravais lattice symbol (cF) in CMSO terminology
Includes space group mapping to number 225 (Fm-3m)

evals.expected_output: Agent runs sample_annotator.py with the full sample description, producing CMSO annotations for material, structure, lattice, and identifying unmapped fields.
assertions: Invokes scripts/sample_annotator.py with --ontology cmso --sample '{"material":"iron","structure":"BCC","lattice_a":2.87,"space_group":229,"simulation_type":"MD"}' --json
Output includes results.annotations with class-property mappings for iron BCC
Maps iron to Fe element and BCC to cI Bravais lattice
Reports unmapped_fields for any keys not recognized (e.g., simulation_type may map or appear as unmapped)

evals.prompt: Map these terms all at once: FCC, copper, lattice constant, unit cell, grain boundary
evals.expected_output: Agent runs concept_mapper.py with multiple terms to batch-map all five concepts to CMSO, identifying any that cannot be matched.
assertions: Invokes scripts/concept_mapper.py with --ontology cmso --terms 'FCC,copper,lattice constant,unit cell,grain boundary' --json
Output includes results.matches for successfully mapped terms
Reports results.unmatched for any terms not found in CMSO (e.g., grain boundary may not exist)
Provides results.suggestions for unmatched terms to guide the user

evals.prompt: Map a hexagonal crystal: Bravais lattice HCP, a=3.21, c=5.21, space group 194. No ontology specified, just give me generic labels.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs crystal_mapper.py without specifying an ontology to produce generic crystallographic labels, including validation of hexagonal lattice constraints.
assertions: Invokes scripts/crystal_mapper.py with --bravais HCP --space-group 194 --a 3.21 --c 5.21 --json (no --ontology flag)
Output includes generic crystal system identification (hexagonal)
Maps HCP to the appropriate Bravais lattice symbol (hP)
Validates that a != c for hexagonal system (no validation warning expected since 3.21 != 5.21)
